data_accessed: Local model config metadata at <user-home>/VoiceForge/models/zonos2-8bit/config.json was briefly inspected for parity; no weights, audio, datasets, or embeddings were read
claims: Core defaults are 28 layers, dim 2048, head_dim 128, n_kv_heads 4, max_seqlen 6144, 9 codebooks, codebook_size 1024, eoa_id 1024, audio_pad_id 1025, text_vocab 519, sample_rate 44100, DAC repo mlx-community/descript-audio-codec-44khz.
Default attention derives 16 query heads from dim/head_dim and 4 KV heads from config; intermediate_size defaults to 3072; audio_vocab_size is codebook_size + 2; frame_width is n_codebooks + 1.

Prompt rows are 9 audio columns plus one text column. Text bytes use BOS/EOS ids 2/3 with byte IDs offset by 192; marker rows fill audio columns with audio_pad_id and put the text/conditioning token in the last column.
Conditioning marker ids are allocated at the tail of text_vocab for speaking rate, quality buckets, speaker background, and accurate mode.
Speaker conditioning adds a speaker slot plus speaker-background/accurate-mode marker rows before the text prompt, then replaces hidden state position 0 with the projected speaker embedding.
Speaker embedding path accepts either a 2048-D embedding or one ref_audio, not both; optional LDA projects 2048 to 1024 before projection to model dim.

Delay layout is triangular shear/shear_up over codebooks. Prompt silence is sheared, generation stores delayed rows, decode calls shear_up, clips codes into [0, codebook_size-1], feeds DAC as [B, codebooks, frames], and trims to frames * 512 samples.

Attention uses wq Linear(dim, num_heads * head_dim), combined wkv ChunkedLinear(dim, 2 * num_kv_heads * head_dim, divisor=2), and wo Linear(num_heads * head_dim, dim). Defaults imply wq 2048->2048, wkv 2048->1024, wo 2048->2048.

MoE layers are enabled for layer indexes 3 through 26 inclusive under defaults; layer 26 uses special top_k 2 while others use top_k 1. Router is down_proj -> RouterMLP -> softmax/topk; experts are SwitchGLU with 16 experts and intermediate_size 3072.
Output head is one linear multi_output of dim -> n_codebooks * audio_vocab_size, reshaped to [..., 9, 1026], with tanh softcap 15 by default.

Sampling defaults are ZONOS2-native: temperature 1.15, top_k 106, top_p 0.0, min_p 0.18, repetition_penalty 1.2. CLI wrapper removes generic defaults for zonos2 so they do not override model defaults.

EOS is audio EOA, not text EOS: any generated codebook id equal to eoa_id sets eos_frame to step - max_eos_codebook and runs an n_codebooks+1 countdown; generated frames append text_vocab as the text column placeholder.

Max sequence budget is only partially enforced in source: config has max_seqlen 6144, but generate defaults to 1024 generated frames and does not visibly cap prompt_tokens + generated tokens against max_seqlen.

Checkpoint loading goes through base_load_model: config is loaded, model class is resolved, weights are loaded, quantization is applied from config/quantization_config and .scales metadata, then weights load and post_load_hook stores model_path.
Converter maps Sonic expert/router keys, writes sharded safetensors/config, and can bundle the Qwen3 speaker encoder.
GenerationResult supports streaming flags, and current model.py emits streaming chunks/final chunks, but README still says streaming is not implemented.
known_risks: Worktree was dirty before audit; two modified files are pre-existing and were not touched.
No weight tensors were loaded, so actual checkpoint tensor shapes were not verified against declared module shapes.
No training code or loss-target builder was found for ZONOS2; invalid target conventions are inferable only from inference behavior.
max_seqlen exists in config but runtime generation does not visibly enforce prompt plus generation length against it.
Streaming code exists in the working tree, but this audit did not run streaming probes; README text appears stale.
DAC and speaker extraction paths were inspected only, not executed.
integration_notes: Future patches should preserve frame width 10: nine audio codebook columns plus one text column.
Speaker conditioning must keep hidden-state replacement behavior at speaker_token_position 0.
Streaming or chunking patches must respect codebook_delay = n_codebooks - 1 and decode only stable de-delayed frames.
Any sequence-limit patch should account for prompt length plus generated frames and max_seqlen 6144.
Loader/quantization patches should stay compatible with apply_quantization using config quantization metadata plus .scales tensors.
